records.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit! Just had to run out of ammo right now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A pirate...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A pirate...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A pirate...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you... just save me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you... just save me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you... just save me?
